name: ofichaos
description: Party game web de deducción social ambientado en una oficina caótica

scripts.test: node --test tests/e2e.test.js && node --test tests/victory_verification.test.js && node --test tests/socket-payloads.test.js tests/client-lifecycle.test.mjs tests/onboarding.test.mjs tests/theme-contract.test.mjs tests/world-layout.test.mjs tests/minigames.test.mjs tests/doors.test.js tests/projections.test.js tests/sabotage-layout.test.mjs tests/task-access.test.js tests/task-sessions.test.js
scripts.check: node --check server/*.js shared/*.js && node --check client/src/main.js && node --check client/src/scenes/*.js && node --check client/src/systems/*.js

author: W
